candidates.label: Instructional type prompts
candidates.description: Posts that instruct the reader to respond with a specific word if a condition is met.

citations.text: Share if you remember where I left my keys. Type 'amen' if you also can't find your keys.
Type 'yes' if you agree that you'd rather type 'no' right now.

candidates.scope_note: This pattern occurs in a handful of posts within the batch.
candidates.boundary_note: It does not appear to be a universal feature across all posts.

candidates.label: Short holiday greetings
candidates.description: Brief celebratory messages that state a holiday or event with minimal text, often ending in a period.
candidates.scope_note: Several posts in the batch use this concise greeting style.
candidates.boundary_note: Not all holiday messages follow this exact format.

candidates.label: Single-word exclamations
candidates.description: Posts composed of one or two words followed by an exclamation mark or minimal punctuation.
candidates.scope_note: A few posts in the batch consist of single-word exclamations.
candidates.boundary_note: Such brevity is not ubiquitous across all messages.
